---
title: 'Ridiculous Fraud Email. Worth Writing About Later.'
date: '2014-04-26T03:54:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7575544405513717555'
blogger_filename: '/2014/04/ridiculous-fraud-email-worth-writing.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Life Events'
---

<br />
<div class="gE iv gt" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; cursor: auto; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; padding: 10px 0px 3px;">
<table cellpadding="0" class="cf gJ" style="border-collapse: collapse; margin-top: 0px; width: auto;"><tbody>
<tr class="acZ" style="height: 16px;"><td class="gF gK" style="margin: 0px; padding-right: 8px; padding-top: 0px; vertical-align: top; white-space: nowrap; width: 563px;"><table cellpadding="0" class="cf ix" style="border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed; width: 563px;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="margin: 0px;"><h3 class="iw" style="display: inline-block; font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; margin: inherit; max-width: 92%; overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap;">
<span class="gD" email="GarryWithingtonge@aol.com" name="Staffing Service" style="color: #222222; display: inline; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; vertical-align: top;">Staffing Service</span>&nbsp;<span class="go" style="color: #555555; vertical-align: top;"><span aria-hidden="true">&lt;</span>GarryWithingtonge@aol.com<span aria-hidden="true">&gt;</span></span></h3>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
</td><td class="gH" style="color: #222222; margin: 0px; text-align: right; vertical-align: top; white-space: nowrap;"><div class="gK" style="padding-right: 2px; padding-top: 0px;">
<span alt="Tue, Apr 22, 2014 at 12:26 PM" class="g3" id=":m7" style="margin-right: 3px; vertical-align: top;" title="Tue, Apr 22, 2014 at 12:26 PM">Apr 22 (3 days ago)</span><div aria-checked="false" aria-label="Starred" class="zd" role="checkbox" style="cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; height: 20px; outline: 0px;" tabindex="0">
<span class="T-KT" style="display: inline-block; height: 19px; margin: -4px 0px; padding: 2px; text-align: center; width: 19px;"><img alt="" class="f T-KT-JX" src="/images/imported/mail-google-com/cleardot-59e555343966.gif" style="margin-top: 0px; vertical-align: top;" /></span></div>
</div>
</td><td class="gH" style="color: #222222; margin: 0px; text-align: right; vertical-align: top; white-space: nowrap;"></td><td class="gH acX" rowspan="2" style="color: #222222; margin: 0px; text-align: right; vertical-align: top; white-space: nowrap;"><div class="T-I J-J5-Ji T-I-Js-IF aaq T-I-ax7 L3" role="button" style="background-color: whitesmoke; border-bottom-left-radius: 2px; border-bottom-right-radius: 0px; border-top-left-radius: 2px; border-top-right-radius: 0px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.0980392); box-shadow: none; color: #444444; cursor: default; display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; height: 27px; line-height: 27px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: -8px; min-width: 32px; outline: 0px; padding: 0px 8px; position: relative; text-align: center; z-index: 1;" tabindex="0" title="Reply">
<img alt="" class="hB T-I-J3" role="button" src="/images/imported/mail-google-com/cleardot-59e555343966.gif" style="background-image: url(/images/imported/ssl-gstatic-com/general-f471e1516770e9528f3dcf0a635516de-4dc0ea848dfb.png); background-position: 0px -191px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; height: 21px; margin-top: -3px; opacity: 0.55; position: relative; vertical-align: middle; width: 21px;" /></div>
<div class="T-I J-J5-Ji T-I-Js-Gs aap T-I-awG T-I-ax7 L3" id=":l4" role="button" style="background-color: whitesmoke; border-bottom-left-radius: 0px; border-bottom-right-radius: 2px; border-top-left-radius: 0px; border-top-right-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.0980392); box-shadow: none; color: #444444; cursor: default; display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; height: 27px; line-height: 27px; margin-left: -1px; margin-right: 0px; margin-top: -8px; min-width: 21px; outline: 0px; padding: 0px; position: relative; text-align: center; z-index: 1;" tabindex="0" title="More">
<img alt="" class="hA T-I-J3" role="menu" src="/images/imported/mail-google-com/cleardot-59e555343966.gif" style="background-image: url(/images/imported/ssl-gstatic-com/general-f471e1516770e9528f3dcf0a635516de-4dc0ea848dfb.png); background-position: 0px -66px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; height: 21px; margin-top: -3px; opacity: 0.55; position: relative; vertical-align: middle; width: 21px;" /></div>
</td></tr>
<tr class="acZ xD" style="height: 16px;"><td colspan="3" style="margin: 0px;"><table cellpadding="0" class="cf adz" style="border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: fixed; white-space: nowrap; width: 713px;"><tbody>
<tr><td class="ady" style="margin: 0px; overflow: hidden;"><div class="iw ajw" style="display: inline-block; max-width: 92%; overflow: hidden;">
<span class="hb" style="color: #777777; vertical-align: top;">to&nbsp;<span class="g2" dir="ltr" email="darrellwolfe@gmail.com" name="me" style="vertical-align: top;">me</span></span></div>
<div aria-haspopup="true" class="ajy" style="display: inline-block; margin-left: 5px; vertical-align: top;">
<img alt="" aria-label="Show details" class="ajz" data-tooltip="Show details" id=":ma" role="button" src="/images/imported/mail-google-com/cleardot-59e555343966.gif" style="background-image: url(https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/?ui=2&amp;view=dim&amp;iv=amo1tqfqsw2s&amp;it=ic); background-position: -60px -100px; background-repeat: no-repeat no-repeat; cursor: pointer; height: 12px !important; padding: 0px 0px 1px; vertical-align: bottom; width: 12px !important;" /></div>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
</div>
<div class="utdU2e" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif;">
</div>
<div class="tx78Ic" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif;">
</div>
<div class="aHl" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif; margin-left: -30px;">
</div>
<div id=":lj" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; font-family: arial, sans-serif;" tabindex="-1">
</div>
<div class="ii gt m1458a7973b0bd4e7 adP adO" id=":nl" style="background-color: white; color: #222222; direction: ltr; font-family: arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; margin: 5px 15px 0px 0px; padding-bottom: 5px; position: relative; z-index: 2;">
<div class="a3s" id=":kp" style="overflow: hidden;">
To whom it may concern<br />Due to heavy expansion project, the company is now looking for new employees!<br /><br />Job Snapshot:<br />Employment Status: Full and Part Time<br />Base Pay: $56,000.00 - $85,900.00 per year. The salary is highly competitive and corresponding with experience<br />Career Category: Management<br />Benefits package available: Paid Vacations &amp; Holidays; Paid Personal &amp; Sick Days; Paid Orientation &amp; Training; Health Care Benefits<br /><br />This position is responsible for overall supplier management as well as execution of multiple supply plans to support company's initiatives into USA market. This person will actively participate in cross-functional project teams and act as the main point of contact for distributors for all assigned programs. This position is responsible for procurement, inventory management, customers support and logistics worldwide.<br /><br />Main supply chain work will consist in but are not limited to:<br />- demand forecast, inventory optimization, on-time delivery internally and to external customers;<br />- ensuring material fulfillment supports, monitor vendor performance;<br />- monthly reporting and action plan to meet yearly stock purpose.<br /><br />The Candidate:<br />- self-starter with an ability to work on a large range of supply chain processes.<br />- must have strong leadership and management skills and be able to present convincingly at senior levels.<br />- exceptional skills in computer proficiency with MS Office standard software packages.<br />- candidates need to have a valid driver's license<br /><br />The declared employer will require a driving record background checks. All applicants applying for job opening must be a US Lawful Permanent Resident, must be 21+. Background and drug screen required. No relocation is required.<br /><br />To get to know more, please respond to present advertising</div>
</div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
